title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at HDFC Bank Global Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at HDFC Bank Global Group
jsonLd.description:
HDFC Bank Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Kochi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HDFC Bank Global Group:
HDFC Bank Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank Global Group!
